furniture.shape_description: This is a compact, two-door refrigerator with a top freezer compartment and a bottom refrigerator compartment. It has a sleek, modern design with a dark grey finish and a visible logo on the upper door. An electrical cord is plugged into a wall outlet to its left.

This is a two-seater sofa upholstered in a textured brown fabric. It features plush seat cushions, back cushions, and padded armrests. A wooden serving tray with cut-out handles is placed on the seat.

This is a wooden dining chair with a curved spindle backrest and a solid seat. It has four legs, with the front legs being straight and the back legs angled. The chair appears to be made of solid wood and has a natural finish.
